title: Red Sea maritime disruption
description: Shipping disruption and route insecurity affecting Egypt, Saudi Arabia, China, and the United States during 2024.

scenario.question: Could Red Sea shipping disruptions and maritime coercion destabilize Egypt, Saudi Arabia, China and the United States in 2024?

historical_signals: The case is calibrated around route insecurity and spillovers into macro and geopolitical stress.
Maritime disruption is expected to dominate over negotiated de-escalation in the initial horizon.
